name: Suspicious PowerShell Download Cradle with IEX and Invoke-RestMethod
description: Detects PowerShell commands using Invoke-RestMethod (IRM) and Invoke-Expression (IEX) to download and execute payloads, a technique commonly leveraged by malware and threat actors for initial-stage payload delivery.

filterSets.name: Suspicious PowerShell Download Cradle with IEX and Invoke-RestMethod

author: Ahmed Kamal & Yusuf Madkour
